== Notes for [[Item:Q116414|Q116414]] ==

•Note: De Castro has his name as Iñigo and his title as Third Señor of Vizcaya. 1

•Occupation: Fourth Señor (Sovereign) of Vizcaya. 2

Sources:

1.Title: GENEALOGIA, HERALDICA E HISTORIA DE NUESTRAS FAMILIAS

Author: De Castro y De Cardenas, Fernando R.

Publication: Ediciones Universal, Miami, FL, 1989 2.Title: DICCIONARIO HERALDICO Y GENEALOGICO DE APELLIDOS ESPAÑOLES Y AMERICANOS, Volume: (88 volumes)

Author: Garcia Carraffa, Alberto y Arturo

Publication: Nueva Imprenta Radio S.A., Madrid, 1952-1963

Note:

NUC: 56-190-597, LOC CR2142.G3

-----------------------------------------------------
https://books.google.com/books?id=RLxDAAAAYAAJ&pg=PA419&lpg=PA419&dq=#v=onepage&q&f=false


IV Señor soberano de Viscaya

IV Señor soberano de Viscaya

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
